description: This false-color satellite image displays a coastal landscape featuring a large dark body of water occupying the left portion, and a landmass on the right. A narrow, light blue/white strip defines the immediate coastline, likely representing a sandy beach or shallow water. The land is predominantly covered by reddish-brown areas, which indicate dense vegetation or shrubland due to strong near-infrared reflectance. These vegetated areas are interspersed with significant patches of light blue/white, suggestive of bare sand, possibly forming dunes or sandy plains. Several narrow, winding dark lines, consistent with small watercourses or dry riverbeds, are visible across the lighter sandy land areas, with one notably flowing into the main body of water. Two small, linear, white features, resembling boats or their wakes, are observable within the dark water body close to the coastline.
